image_prompts:
# Scene 01 — Two Children Trapped in the Pit

Episode: EP01 — The Golden Stair That Saves Only One

## GPTImages2 Prompt

Attached image order for this scene: @img1 = Khun Phloeng, @img2 = Nin, @img3 = Khun Thongdaeng, @img4 = Khram.

Create a vertical 9:16 AI short-drama image using @img1 (Khun Phloeng), @img2 (Nin), @img3 (Khun Thongdaeng), @img4 (Khram). Khram must appear in warm burnt-orange glass/outfit, clearly not blue or cyan. Visual style: realistic Thai drama characters with cinematic semi-photoreal faces and grounded emotional acting; high-end anime painted backgrounds: hand-painted 2D anime environment art with clean linework, soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed Thai-period locations and props, gentle haze, rich but natural colors, polished feature-film anime background finish; not a generic flat cartoon and not a 3D environment; vertical 9:16 phone-video composition; dramatic depth of field; premium AI short-drama production still; no text overlay, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo. Scene action: Open the story BEFORE any golden stair appears. A deep square flooded pit inside a tall brick underground chamber fills the frame. Nin and Khram are both trapped together at the bottom, shivering in rising dark water and looking up for help. Above the pit edge, the two fathers stand looking down from opposite sides: Khun Phloeng grips old magical books with desperate protective fear, while Khun Thongdaeng watches coldly with wealthy authority. Do not show a golden stair, golden bridge, or anyone already climbing yet; this first image must clearly establish that both children are stuck below and both fathers are watching from above. Emphasize the vertical height difference, the dangerous water level, the pit walls, the power imbalance, intense melodramatic facial expressions, clear actor blocking, coherent continuity, and a clean composition that reads instantly on a phone screen. Keep all characters consistent with their attached reference images. No text overlay, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo.
